name: ai.gatetest.www/gatetest
description: 120-module QA gate. Give Claude eyes (screenshots), ears (Sentry errors), and hands (verify fixes).

environmentVariables.name: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Claude API key — enables fix_issue and explain_finding (AI auto-fix + diagnosis). Optional; all scan, screenshot, and runtime-check tools work without it.

environmentVariables.name: SENTRY_AUTH_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Sentry auth token — enables get_production_errors to pull live error data from Sentry. Pair with SENTRY_ORG and SENTRY_PROJECT.

environmentVariables.name: SENTRY_ORG
environmentVariables.description: Your Sentry organisation slug (e.g. 'acme-corp'). Required when using SENTRY_AUTH_TOKEN.

environmentVariables.name: SENTRY_PROJECT
environmentVariables.description: Your Sentry project slug (e.g. 'backend-api'). Required when using SENTRY_AUTH_TOKEN.

environmentVariables.name: DATADOG_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Datadog API key — enables get_production_errors to pull live error data from Datadog Logs. Pair with DATADOG_APP_KEY.

environmentVariables.name: DATADOG_APP_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Datadog application key — required alongside DATADOG_API_KEY for Logs API access.

environmentVariables.name: ROLLBAR_READ_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Rollbar read-access token — enables get_production_errors to pull live error data from Rollbar.

environmentVariables.name: GATETEST_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Premium MCP subscription key ($29/mo at gatetest.ai/mcp). Unlocks full 120-module scans, AI fix, Eyes (screenshot), Ears (production errors), Hands (verify_fix). Free tools work without a key: check_health, list_modules, get_badge, scan_url, scan_local (quick suite only).
